meta.title: Contact — Triko

meta.title: About — Triko
meta.description: Discover Triko: our story, mission, values, and store locations.

hero.title: TRIKO
hero.description: Triko is the first and only Georgian brand creating underwear, pajama sets, and unisex kimonos for women and men. What started as a local brand in Tbilisi is now expanding internationally, sharing our vision of comfort and individuality with a wider audience.
hero.subtitle: Triko blends cozy materials, thoughtful fits, and clean lines to create everyday pieces you’ll reach for again and again.

whoIsTrikoFor.title: Who is Triko for?
whoIsTrikoFor.desc: Our unisex designs are created for all genders and lifestyles, allowing freedom of movement, self-expression, and ease in everyday life.
whoIsTrikoFor.isTrikoFor1: For people who value comfort just as much as style.
whoIsTrikoFor.isTrikoFor2: For those who love color, simplicity, and feeling good in what they wear.

goal.title: Our Goal
goal.slogan1: Our goal is to create products for

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.desc: We believe that quality should be accessible. Triko is a budget-oriented brand with high standards—proving that good materials, thoughtful design, and comfort do not have to come at a high price.

WhatWeCreate.desc: We design and produce underwear, pajama sets, and unisex kimonos that are meant to be worn every day. Our collections are modern, functional, and expressive—created to feel natural on the body while still standing out visually.

FabricsAndQuality.title: Fabrics & Quality
FabricsAndQuality.desc: Fabric is the foundation of Triko. We work very delicately with materials, carefully choosing natural, breathable, and skin-friendly textiles. Every product is made to be comfortable, soft, and long-lasting, so you can truly feel the difference when wearing it.

Georgia.title: From Georgia to the World
Georgia.desc: Proudly founded in Georgia, Triko began as a local brand and is now growing internationally. While our roots remain in Tbilisi, our vision is global—bringing Georgian creativity, care, and craftsmanship to customers around the world.

store4.title: Kutaisi
store4.address: 14 Tamar Mepe St (Cinema Georgia building, 2nd floor)

cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
cta.subtitle: Explore our latest drops and everyday staples.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How Triko collects, uses, shares, and protects your information.

hero.title: Your privacy matters
hero.description: This Privacy Policy explains how Triko collects, uses, shares, and protects your information when you use our website and services.
hero.appliesTo: Applies to: Triko website and online store

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.body: Triko is a brand and online store. In this policy, “Triko,” “we,” “us,” and “our” refer to the entity operating this website and providing our services.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.lead: We may collect the following categories of information:
items: Contact details, such as name, email address, phone number, and delivery address
Account details, such as login identifiers and preferences if you create an account
Order information, such as items purchased, size, color, order total, and order history
Payment related data handled by our payment providers (we do not store full card numbers)
Device and usage data, such as IP address, browser type, pages viewed, and approximate location derived from IP
Customer support content, such as messages you send us and our replies

use.title: How we use information
items: Provide and operate the website and store
Process orders, deliveries, returns, and customer support
Send transactional messages about your orders
Detect, prevent, and investigate fraud and abuse
Improve our products, site performance, and user experience
Send marketing communications if you opt in, and allow you to opt out at any time

cookies.title: Cookies and analytics
cookies.p1: We use cookies and similar technologies to keep the site working, remember your preferences, and understand usage. You can control cookies through your browser settings. If you disable cookies, some features may not work as intended.
cookies.p2: If we use analytics tools, they help us measure traffic and site performance. Where required, we will request consent before setting non essential cookies.

sharing.title: Sharing and disclosures
sharing.lead: We may share information in these situations:
items: Service providers who help us run the business, such as hosting, email delivery, customer support tools, and analytics
Delivery and logistics partners to ship your order and provide tracking
Payment providers to process payments and prevent fraud
Legal and safety reasons, such as complying with law, responding to lawful requests, or protecting rights and safety
Business changes, such as a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets (information may be transferred as part of that deal)
sharing.note: We do not sell your personal information in the ordinary meaning of “sell.”

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Payments are processed by third party payment providers. Your payment information is handled according to their policies. We typically receive limited payment details, such as payment status and a token or reference, not full card numbers.

security.title: Security
security.body: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: We keep personal information only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, including legal, accounting, and operational requirements. Retention periods may vary depending on the type of data and the purpose.

rights.title: Your rights and choices
rights.lead: Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or receive a copy of your personal information, and to object or restrict certain processing.
items: Marketing emails: you can unsubscribe using the link in the message
Account: you can update certain details in your account settings if available
Requests: you can contact us to request access, correction, or deletion where applicable

children.title: Children
children.body: Our services are not intended for children. If you believe a child has provided personal information, contact us so we can take appropriate steps.

international.title: International transfers
international.body: Your information may be processed in countries other than your own, for example where our service providers operate. Where required, we take steps to provide appropriate safeguards for transfers.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.p1: For privacy questions or requests, contact us at

note.title: Note
note.body: This page is a high quality template. For best accuracy, update payment providers, shipping partners, your company legal name, address, and jurisdiction specific rights.

meta.title: Terms and Conditions
meta.description: The rules and conditions for using Triko’s website and services.

hero.title: Terms and Conditions
hero.description: These Terms explain the rules for using Triko’s website and purchasing from our online store.
hero.appliesTo: Applies to: Triko website and online store

about.title: About these Terms
about.body: By accessing or using our website and services, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the website.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be able to form a binding contract under applicable law to use our services. If you are using the website on behalf of a business, you confirm you are authorized to do so.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: If you create an account, you are responsible for keeping your login details secure and for activity under your account. Tell us promptly if you suspect unauthorized access.

orders.title: Orders
orders.body: Placing an order is an offer to purchase. We may refuse or cancel an order in limited cases, including suspected fraud, incorrect pricing, or inventory issues. If we cancel after payment, we will refund according to the payment method.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.body: Prices are shown in the currency displayed at checkout and may change at any time. Taxes, shipping, and fees (if any) are shown before you confirm payment.

shipping.title: Shipping
shipping.body: Delivery times are estimates and can vary by location and carrier. Risk of loss transfers to you upon delivery, where allowed by law.

returns.title: Returns
returns.body: Return and exchange rules depend on product type and condition. See our returns guidance (or contact support) for steps, time limits, and eligibility.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Payments are processed by third party providers. We may receive limited payment data such as status and reference identifiers.

content.title: Content and intellectual property
content.body: All website content, including designs, text, images, logos, and code, is owned by Triko or its licensors and protected by applicable laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or use it without permission.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
items: Do not misuse the website or attempt to disrupt it
Do not access accounts or data without authorization
Do not upload malicious code or perform automated scraping without permission
Do not use the website for unlawful or harmful activities

warranties.title: Disclaimers
warranties.body: The website and services are provided “as is” and “as available,” to the fullest extent permitted by law. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error free operation.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Triko will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages. Where liability cannot be excluded, it will be limited to the minimum extent permitted by law.

changes.title: Changes to these Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. The updated date at the top shows when changes were last made. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated Terms.

law.title: Governing law
law.body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to the entity operating the Triko website, without regard to conflict of law rules.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: For questions about these Terms, contact us at

note.title: Note
note.body: This is a high quality template. For best accuracy, tailor returns, shipping, legal entity details, and consumer rights for your jurisdiction.

meta.title: Exchange Policy
meta.description: Triko exchange rules and how to request an exchange.

hero.title: Exchange Policy
hero.description: Triko does not accept returns. We offer exchanges for selected items under the conditions below.

overview.title: Overview
overview.p1: We do not accept returns. Exchanges are available only for specific categories within the allowed window.
overview.calloutBody: For hygiene reasons, underwear cannot be exchanged.

eligible.title: Eligible items
items: Pajamas can be exchanged within 5 days of delivery
Kimonos can be exchanged within 5 days of delivery

conditions.title: Exchange conditions
items: Item must be in original condition
Item must be unused and undamaged
Underwear is not eligible for exchange

how.title: How to request an exchange
steps: Visit our store or email us
Include your order number and the item you want to exchange
After confirmation, we will share the next steps

footer.noteBody: The exchange window starts from the delivery date. Used or damaged items are not eligible.

meta.title: Shipping Policy
meta.description: Delivery timelines for Tbilisi, regions, and international orders.

hero.title: Shipping Policy
hero.description: Estimated delivery timelines for Tbilisi, regions, and international orders.

tbilisi.title: Tbilisi
tbilisi.body: For orders placed before 15:00 in Tbilisi, delivery is made the next day.
tbilisi.calloutBody: Orders placed after 15:00 may be delivered on the next business day.

regions.title: Regions
regions.body: For regions, delivery typically takes 3–4 business days.

international.title: International orders
international.body: International delivery timelines depend on your local postal service.

support.title: Questions and contact
support.body: If you have any questions about your order or delivery, contact us at:
